product_overview: Nayana Pulse is a browser-based assistive system that uses a standard laptop webcam for eye-gaze communication (quadrant-based selection) and non-contact clinical vitals monitoring. (See PDF: page 1 problem statement describing communication for paralyzed patients; page 2 lists approach and tech stack; page 3 shows architecture: Webcam Input -> Processing Layer -> Smart UI/TTS.)
core_goals: Provide a low-cost, zero-hardware-assumption communication interface for paralyzed patients using webcam-based eye tracking.
Deliver real-time, explainable clinical risk analysis from non-contact vitals (blink rate, head tilt) using an AI engine.
Enable clear voice output of patient-selected phrases using TTS so users can communicate verbally.
Make the system robust to external API failures and offline/fallback scenarios (Gemini quota limits, gaze calibration drop-offs).
Keep the front-end lightweight (React + Vite + Tailwind) and minimize backend dependencies to allow deployment in low-resource clinics.

features.name: Patient Registration
features.description: Local session setup to register patient name, age and clinical condition; creates a patient session used by the gaze UI and vitals monitor. Registration is handled locally in the frontend state (/register) and persisted to browser storage or a lightweight backend when available.
user_flows: LOCAL POST /register with JSON {name, age, condition} -> Receive 200 OK with {sessionId, patientId} -> LOCAL GET /session/{sessionId} -> Receive 200 with patient profile and stored registration state (happy path)
LOCAL POST /register with missing required fields (e.g., missing name) -> Receive 400 with validation error {field:'name', message:'required'} (error path)

features.name: Gaze Tracking Dashboard
features.description: Loads the external gaze engine script, performs calibration, and provides quadrant-based selection events for communication UI. (Based on codebase: UI uses GazeCloudAPI/WebGazer; see code_summary and PDF page 2 approach/tech stack.)
user_flows: GET https://api.gazerecorder.com/GazeCloudAPI.js -> Receive 200 with script payload -> LOCAL POST /gaze/calibrate with calibrationData -> Receive 200 {calibration:ok} -> LOCAL POST /gaze/track/start -> Receive 200 {streamId} -> LOCAL GET /gaze/selection?streamId={streamId} -> Receive 200 with selection events (quadrant: top-right) (happy path)

GET https://api.gazerecorder.com/GazeCloudAPI.js -> Receive 200 but calibration returns low_confidence -> LOCAL POST /gaze/calibrate with calibrationData -> Receive 422 {error:'calibration_failed'} -> LOCAL POST /gaze/fallback -> Receive 200 {fallback_mode:'enabled'} -> LOCAL GET /gaze/selection?mode=fallback -> Receive 204 {message:'no reliable selection'} (error / fallback path)

features.name: AI Vitals Monitor
features.description: Sends extracted non-contact vitals and short image/metrics summaries to the Google Gemini generative language endpoint for clinical risk scoring and reasoning; used to generate time-series alerts and recommendations (see code_summary and PDF page 3 architecture).
user_flows: POST https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com with Authorization: Bearer <token> and payload {vitals, timestamps, summary} -> Receive 200 with {risk_score, reasoning, recommended_action} -> LOCAL POST /alerts with {patientId, risk_score, reasoning} -> Receive 201 {alertId} (happy path)

POST https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com with Authorization: Bearer <token> and payload {vitals} -> Receive 429 {error:'Quota exceeded'} -> LOCAL GET /vitals/last_cached?patientId={id} -> Receive 200 with cached vitals -> LOCAL POST /notifications with {patientId, message:'AI monitoring degraded — using cached vitals'} -> Receive 202 accepted (error / degraded fallback path)

features.name: Voice Synthesis (TTS)
features.description: Converts patient-selected phrases into natural-sounding speech using ElevenLabs TTS API; provides audio playback in the UI and a queued retry mechanism for transient failures.
user_flows: POST https://api.elevenlabs.io/text-to-speech with Authorization: Bearer <api_key> and body {text, voice, format} -> Receive 200 with {audio_url} -> LOCAL GET /audio/play?url={audio_url} -> Receive 200 playback_started (happy path)

POST https://api.elevenlabs.io/text-to-speech with Authorization: Bearer <invalid_or_expired_key> and body {text} -> Receive 401 {error:'Unauthorized'} -> LOCAL POST /voice/queue with {text, retryCount:0} -> Receive 202 {queued:true} (error / queued-retry path)

features.name: Patient Registration
features.description: Initial setup for patient sessions including name, age, and clinical condition.

features.name: Gaze Tracking Dashboard
features.description: High-precision eye-gaze communication interface with quadrant-based selection.

features.name: AI Vitals Monitor
features.description: Real-time clinical risk analysis using Google Gemini.

features.name: Voice Synthesis
features.description: Speech dubbing for patient phrases using ElevenLabs.

known_limitations.impact: Real-time vitals monitoring fails under high load
Tracking accuracy drops when eyes are not properly calibrated
